title: Best Practices for Structuring a Project Board
excerpt: I’m managing a large project with multi teams and tasks. What is the most efficient way to structure my board, including groups, columns, and dependencies, to ensure smooth workflow and tracking?

posts.author: alexadam (Alex Adam)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m managing a large project with multi teams and tasks. What is the most efficient way to structure my board, including groups, columns, and dependencies, to ensure smooth workflow and tracking?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a loaded question… We’d need to know quite a bit more about your processes and goals to give ideas. I’d recommend starting with a blank board and playing to get ideas and then go from there.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you can meet on an Australian Timezone, I’d be happy to walk you through your options on a call under a free consult (including which monday tier you will need). You can book in below.
